CustomField.description: Location and/or Venue Details. For HCP Educational Support, include the city and country of the HCP's practice as well as the city and country where the educational event will take place. For Event Sponsorship or a Company-organized Event, include details describing the event venue (with supporting documentation demonstrating that the event will be held at a venue that is appropriate and conducive to the main purpose of the meeting, the city and country where it is located, et cetera).
CustomField.label: Location details
